questions.prompt: Before changing anything in the Printix Administrator for a customer, MSP staff should confirm the Printix Home name in the header.
questions.explanation: The most expensive MSP mistake is editing the wrong tenant. The header (e.g. ablemoose.printix.net) is the canonical check before any change.

questions.prompt: A user's job submitted but didn't print. Which Administrator page first shows whether their workstation's agent is online?
questions.explanation: Computers lists every workstation with the Printix Client and shows Online or Offline status, plus a Diagnostics tab with per-machine counters.
